creator: draco@marino.st
text:
Now I see that this port isn't standalone.  It is linking with the base 
libdialog (a modern version), and also requires the dlg_config.h header 
from the base system.

If this port were truly to be standalone, it would need to be linked 
with a version of dialog from ports.  I can see this PR being closed as 
a "WONT FIX" if its decided that using base dialog is fine.
